assurance.title: Garantia
assurance.subtitle: A verificação ocorre dentro da autoridade.
assurance.eventsOrderedBody: Cada sinal e ação é sequenciado. O sistema não processa resultados fora de ordem; a causalidade é preservada para que o que aconteceu possa ser reconstruído e verificado.

assurance.invalidStatesBody: Verificações de integridade rodam para que estados inconsistentes ou impossíveis sejam detectados. Quando algo está errado, o sistema escala em vez de prosseguir dentro da autoridade. A confiança é substituída por correção demonstrável.

goLive.afterHoursEmergency: Seu agente verificará rapidamente se é emergência e, se for, transferirá para seu contato de emergência. Caso contrário, tomará uma mensagem detalhada.
goLive.afterHoursClosed: Seu agente dirá que o escritório está fechado, informará o horário se souber e convidará a deixar uma mensagem.
goLive.afterHoursDefault: Seu agente verificará dados básicos, informará que sua equipe não está disponível e tomará uma mensagem para follow-up.
goLive.escalationWithTransfer: Seu agente manterá a calma, confirmará por que querem um humano e transferirá para seu número salvo quando as regras de escalação coincidirem.
goLive.escalationNoTransfer: Seu agente manterá a calma, explicará com o que pode ajudar e, se necessário, tomará uma mensagem com os dados do chamador para um humano dar follow-up.

0.question: How fast can I be live?
0.answer: Most teams are live within minutes. Connect your number, configure your workflows, run a test, and go live. You can refine sequences and agent behavior after you see it working.

1.question: Is there a free trial?
1.answer: Yes. 14 days. No credit card required. Full access to all features on your plan.

2.question: Can I use my existing business number?
2.answer: Yes. Keep your current number and forward to Recall Touch, or provision new numbers directly.

3.question: What exactly does Recall Touch do?
3.answer: Recall Touch is an AI revenue operations platform. It handles inbound and outbound communication, automated follow-up sequences, appointment booking, lead qualification, escalation to your team, and full revenue attribution. Think of it as the execution layer that runs your revenue operations automatically.

4.question: Does the AI sound robotic?
4.answer: Not even close. Recall Touch uses 32 premium AI voices engineered with natural pauses, real intonation, pitch variation, and conversational warmth. Play a sample on our voice preview above and judge for yourself.

5.question: Who is this for?
5.answer: Any business or team that generates revenue through conversations. Solo consultants, sales teams, agencies, service businesses, clinics, law firms, real estate teams, recruiters, multi-location operators, and more. If you have leads, appointments, or follow-up to manage, Recall Touch runs it.

6.question: Do I need to replace my CRM?
6.answer: No. Recall Touch is the execution layer that sits on top of your CRM. It handles communication, follow-up, booking, and attribution. Your CRM stays as your system of record.

7.question: How do you prevent bad automation?
7.answer: Every agent has configurable guardrails: per-contact frequency limits, business hours enforcement, opt-out compliance, confidence thresholds, and human escalation rules. You can require approval before any action executes. Every action is logged and reviewable.

8.question: Does this work for outbound too?
8.answer: Yes. Recall Touch supports 10 outbound campaign types including speed-to-lead, appointment setting, reactivation, quote follow-up, and cold outreach. Outbound runs with the same guardrails, compliance, and attribution as inbound.

9.question: How is ROI measured?
9.answer: Every call, follow-up, and booking is attributed to revenue outcomes. Your dashboard shows exactly what the system produced, broken down by workflow, campaign, and agent. Weekly digest emails summarize performance.

10.question: What if the AI makes a mistake?
10.answer: Full transparency. Review transcripts and recordings for any call. Adjust agent behavior, scripts, and escalation rules in real time. Run agents in sandbox mode to preview before going live. Every action has an audit trail.

quickStart.title: Início rápido
quickStart.description: Configure o Recall Touch em cerca de 5 minutos: cadastro, dados do negócio, agente IA, número de telefone e chamada de teste.
quickStart.step1: Vá em Começar grátis e crie sua conta.
quickStart.step2: Informe nome, endereço e telefone do negócio.

quickStart.step5: Use a aba Teste na página Agentes para fazer uma chamada real e confirmar que tudo funciona.
